midjourney/v8.1.description: Latest flagship image generation model. Entered alpha in April 2026, reached general availability across web and Discord on April 30, 2026, and became the default model on June 10, 2026. Delivers high-resolution image generation and improved coherence in complex scenes. Supports video generation.
midjourney/v8.1.notes: Omni Reference replaces Character Reference in V7. Draft mode generates images at reduced resolution and quality, using half the GPU time of standard prompts.

midjourney/v8.description: Released March 2026 with faster generation speed, native high-resolution image support, improved text rendering, and better prompt understanding.
midjourney/v8.notes: Superseded by V8.1 for most use cases.

midjourney/v7.description: Released April 2025; became default on June 17, 2025. Handles text and image prompts with precision, with richer textures and more coherent details—especially in bodies, hands, and objects.
midjourney/v7.notes: Pan still utilizes V6.1 when using V7. Omni Reference is available.

midjourney/v6.1.notes: Legacy model. Superseded by V7 and V8 models.

midjourney/niji-7.description: Anime and illustration-focused model developed with Spellbrush. Features improved anime coherence, prompt understanding, text rendering, and style reference performance. Enhanced line art and silhouette control for distinct artistic styles.
midjourney/niji-7.notes: Latest Niji model. Released January 2026. Character reference (cref) is not currently supported in Niji 7.

midjourney/niji-6.description: Anime model with improved rendering of Japanese text, handling short kana text effectively and rendering simple Chinese characters. Better image detail.

image-generation.description: AI-powered image generation from text prompts.

editor.description: Full-featured image editor on the web platform.

web-app.description: Access Midjourney through the web interface (alpha.midjourney.com).

personalization.description: Create personalized styles based on your preferences. Compatible with V6, V7, and V8 models.

moodboards.description: Create styles using a specific collection of images.

style-reference.description: Reference a style from an image for consistent aesthetic output.

character-reference.description: Recreate a specific character in multiple images.
character-reference.notes: In V7, Omni Reference provides enhanced character consistency.

omni-reference.description: Advanced reference feature that automatically runs the prompt in V7, providing improved style and character consistency. May consume additional GPU time.

draft-mode.description: Generate draft images at half the GPU time of standard prompts. Generates 4 images at lower resolution and quality. Use 'Enhance' to regenerate at higher quality.

relax-mode.description: Queued processing, typically 1-10 minutes. Free and unlimited on Standard and above plans. Ideal for users who prefer quality over speed.

turbo-mode.description: Fastest available generation speed, roughly 15-30 seconds. Consumes GPU time at twice the rate of Fast Mode.

stealth-mode.description: Make your creations private on the Midjourney website. Available on Pro and Mega plans.

video-generation.description: Turn static images into short animated videos using AI motion generation. Available on Pro and Mega plans.

plans.notes: Approximately 3.3 Fast GPU hours/month. No Relax Mode. No Turbo Mode. Annual billing saves approximately 17% (effective $8/month).
Approximately 15 Fast GPU hours/month. Unlimited Relax Mode. Annual billing saves approximately 20% (effective $24/month).
Increased Fast GPU hours. Includes Stealth Mode and Turbo Mode. Video generation available. Annual billing saves approximately 20% (effective $48/month).
60 Fast GPU hours/month. Unlimited Relax Mode. Highest concurrency. Designed for enterprises and power users. Annual billing saves approximately 20% (effective $96/month).

models.notes: No official public API. Access through subscription plans only.
No official public API. Access through subscription plans only.
No official public API. Access through subscription plans only.
No official public API. Access through subscription plans only.

subscriptionModel.description: Midjourney does not offer a public API. Access is provided through monthly subscriptions with GPU-hour allocations. Third-party providers may offer API access at additional cost.

gpuHours.description: Usage is measured in GPU hours. Fast Mode consumes 1 GPU hour per hour of generation. Turbo Mode consumes 2× GPU time. Draft Mode consumes half the GPU time.

annualDiscount.description: Annual billing provides a discount compared to monthly billing. The exact percentage may vary; typical savings are around 20%.

apiPricing.notes: Midjourney does not publish per-token pricing. Access is subscription-based with GPU-hour allocations. Third-party providers may offer API access, but these are not official Midjourney offerings.

notes: Midjourney operates on a subscription model with four tiers: Basic ($10/mo), Standard ($30/mo), Pro ($60/mo), and Mega ($120/mo). Annual billing provides savings. V8.1 is the latest flagship model as of June 2026. Niji 7 is the latest anime-focused model. No official public API is available. Usage is measured in GPU hours with different modes (Draft, Fast, Relax, Turbo) affecting consumption rates. Video generation is available on Pro and Mega plans.
